chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-728 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 08.11.2016. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = None present for the petitioner, same was the position on the last date of hearing. This petition primarily involves the question of life and liberty of the petitioner and her main grievance is that the respondent No.3-SHO P.S B-Section Latifabad, Hyderabad should not cause any harassment to the husband of the petitioner namely Shah Zaib. The police officials/respondents have already filed their comments, in which they have categorically mentioned that no harassment was ever caused to the petitioner and her husband, it appears that purpose of filing of the present petition has been achieved. Consequently, this petition is disposed of with the directions that police officials should conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner and her husband in any manner whatsoever. JUDGE Shahid
